Coming up in the Commons: 14-18 January Wondering what's happening this week in the House of Commons? From bills to oral questions, our business highlights will keep you on top of everything coming up in the Chamber. 11 December 2020 - UK Parliament

Public Services Committee holds its first online seminar to discuss the Committee’s first report Public Service Committee holds online roundtable event on 16 December at 2.45pm 11 December 2020 - UK Parliament

Seventh edition of guidance on proceedings for hybrid House and provisions for Grand Committee published Latest guidance for hybrid House and hybrid Grand Committee published 11 December 2020 - UK Parliament

New job creation plan needed to prevent New Year spike in unemployment The Economic Affairs Committee publishes its report ‘Employment and COVID-19: time for a new deal’. 14 December 2020 - UK Parliament

Difficulty finding registered tradesmen among Green Homes Grant criticisms The Environmental Audit Committee has written to Energy Minister Kwasi Kwarteng following the EAC’s recent survey on early attempts to access the Green Homes Grant. 14 December 2020 - UK Parliament

Featured item: House of Lords Podcast: meet Baroness Grey-Thompson and the Legislation Office Listen to episode two, part one of the House of Lords Podcast, featuring Baroness Grey-Thompson and the Legislation Office. A transcript is also available. 11 December 2020 - UK Parliament
Featured item: This week in the Commons: 7 - 11 December Find out what happened this week in the House of Commons. 11 December 2020 - UK Parliament
